basic_details.job_title: CSIR NML Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Project Assistant, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Metallurgical Laboratory (CSIR-NML) has published the Project Staff Recruitment 2026 notification at nml.res.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 15 Project Staff positions. Candidates within the age range of 28 to 35 years (post-wise variation with relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC candidates) and holding B.E/B.Tech, M.E/M.Tech, M.Sc, Diploma in Engineering, B.Sc in Chemistry/Physics/Material Science, along with GATE/NET qualification where applicable are eligible to participate. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 09 July 2026 and 10 July 2026, where candidates can di

application_fee.all_candidates_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Assistant-II and Project Associate-I, 28 years for Project-JRF, 32 years for Project-SRF. Relaxable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC candidates.

Project-JRF: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, and for OBC is 3 years. Project-SRF: Maximum Age: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, and for OBC is 3 years.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NML Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NML Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR NML Job 2026 Notification PDF

Age relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, and for OBC is 3 years. Project Associate-II (PAT-II): Maximum Age: 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, and for OBC is 3 years. content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test (if number of candidates is high) Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NML recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for July 9, 2026, and July 10, 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, candidates need a B.E/B.Tech in relevant engineering fields or an M.Sc. in Chemistry, Physics, or Material Science, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for Project-JRF positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project-JRF positions is 28 years, with relaxations applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Project Assistant-II posts?
faq.answer: Project Assistant-II posts offer emoluments of Rs. 20,000/- + HRA, with specific variations for different roles as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring a filled application form, self-attested copies of educational and experience certificates, Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and original documents for verification, along with a recent passport photograph.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these project staff positions?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test if the number of candidates is high, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at CSIR-NML, Burmamines, Jamshedpur-831007, Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific experience requirements for Project Associate-II posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for Project Associate-II posts, candidates with a B.Tech/B.E. degree require 02 years of experience in R&D in industrial or academic institutions.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 15 vacancies are announced for various Project Staff positions.
